ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player */,
  "percentile" REAL /* Percentile of the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played */,
  "w_l_ratio" REAL /* Win-loss ratio of the player */,
  "survive_rate" REAL /* Survival rate of the player */,
  "k_d_ratio" REAL /* K/D ratio of the player */,
  "avg_score" INTEGER /* Average score of the player */,
  "adjusted_score" REAL /* Adjusted score of the player */,
  "progress" REAL /* Progress of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date when the player account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the player's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_season_stats" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the season */,
  "w_l_ratio" REAL /* Win-loss ratio in the season */,
  "survive_rate" REAL /* Survival rate in the season */,
  "k_d_ratio" REAL /* K/D ratio in the season */,
  "avg_score" INTEGER /* Average score in the season */,
  "adjusted_score" REAL /* Adjusted score in the season */,
  "progress" REAL /* Progress in the season */,
  "most_played_game_mode" TEXT /* Most played game mode in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modes" (
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "game_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game mode */,
  "game_mode_type" TEXT /* Type of the game mode (e.g., team-based, solo) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_mode_stats" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the game mode */,
  "w_l_ratio" REAL /* Win-loss ratio in the game mode */,
  "survive_rate" REAL /* Survival rate in the game mode */,
  "k_d_ratio" REAL /* K/D ratio in the game mode */,
  "avg_score" INTEGER /* Average score in the game mode */,
  "adjusted_score" REAL /* Adjusted score in the game mode */,
  "progress" REAL /* Progress in the game mode */,
  "favorite_weapon" TEXT /* Favorite weapon used in the game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard */,
  "leaderboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the leaderboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the leaderboard */,
  "leaderboard_type" TEXT /* Type of the leaderboard (e.g., seasonal, overall) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_leaderboard_stats" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leaderboard */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player on the leaderboard */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the player on the leaderboard */,
  "change_in_rank" INTEGER /* Change in rank of the player on the leaderboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "leaderboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the player data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the player data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_mode_stats" (
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode */,
  "light" REAL /* Light statistic for the game mode */,
  "medium" REAL /* Medium statistic for the game mode */,
  "heavy" REAL /* Heavy statistic for the game mode */,
  "assault" REAL /* Assault statistic for the game mode */,
  "game_mode_popularity" REAL /* Popularity of the game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasonal_game_mode_stats" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode */,
  "light" REAL /* Light statistic for the game mode in the season */,
  "medium" REAL /* Medium statistic for the game mode in the season */,
  "heavy" REAL /* Heavy statistic for the game mode in the season */,
  "assault" REAL /* Assault statistic for the game mode in the season */,
  "seasonal_game_mode_popularity" REAL /* Popularity of the game mode in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id", "game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_mode_preferences" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode */,
  "preference_score" REAL /* Preference score of the player for the game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_season_preferences" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "preference_score" REAL /* Preference score of the player for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "season_id")
)
